race.comment: The well-related MANUKAU (9) (half to G2 winner Ohope) is a very consistent conveyance who has only missed the quinella spot once in nine career efforts and doesn't know how to run a bad race. Gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claim and must be respected out of the Freedman camp. Will run her usual honest race. CLIMACTIC (4) has a win and a placing from three attempts over this distance range and will be rock-hard fit for this. Top-three candidate. ALPHA BRAVO (2) has notched up two wins from three starts at Ipswich, is among the chances. CLICK CLICK BOOM (3) honest type who was successful last time out over 1200m at this track at the third run back from a spell. Include.
